basic_details.job_title: BEL Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics (BEL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Medical Officer. Candidates with MBBS Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through BEL official website bel-india.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS (Pass class, recognized by Medical Council of India), Registered with Medical Council of India or any State Medical Council, Minimum 2 years relevant post-qualification experience

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
